news.t: Europe's Economy Faces Sink-or-Swim Moment as Trump Returns

holdings.infoBox: FLEU is an equity ETF with a total of 264 individual holdings. The top holdings are ASML Holding stock at 9.42%, Siemens Aktiengesellschaft at 2.94%, Banco Santander at 2.55%, Schneider Electric S.E. at 2.25%, and Allianz SE at 2.24%.

overview.description: The Franklin FTSE Eurozone ETF (FLEU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Developed Eurozone index. The fund tracks a market cap weighted index of large- and mid-cap companies in the developed Eurozone. The currency exposure is not hedged FLEU was launched on Nov 2, 2017 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.

data.title: Europe's Economy Faces Sink-or-Swim Moment as Trump Returns
data.text: With the U.S. election result and the German government's collapse, the lagging European economy is at a crossroads.
